name: Bechamel Sauce- Adventures in Microwave Cook
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 1-quart glass measuring pitcher in the microwave oven (about 30 seconds at High). Add onion and flour; mix well. Gradually add broth and half-and-half, stirring constantly. Cook uncovered for 5 minutes at High, stirring after 2 minutes and then every 30 seconds.
2. Remove from the microwave; stir in seasonings.
Yield: About 1 cup.
